services.title: Autonomous Systems Engineering
services.description: We design and implement autonomous physical systems that operate under uncertainty.

services.title: Industrial & IoT System Stabilization
services.description: Many industrial and IoT systems technically work, but require constant human intervention to keep running.
points: harden control logic and state handling
reduce crashes, resets, and manual overrides

services.title: Edge & Control Architecture Design
services.description: Architecture design for systems where decisions must be made close to the physical world.

services.title: Technical Diagnostics & Risk Reviews
services.description: Short, paid diagnostic engagements to understand why a system behaves unpredictably or requires manual supervision.
